title: Tatchaporn Ongphichetmetha
text:
Tatchaporn is a Thai neurologist focused on multiple sclerosis and autoimmune neurology. Tatchaporn is also eager to expand her expertise as a clinical epidemiologist, aiming to blend research with patient care.


Cleveland Clinic, Mellen Center for Multiple Sclerosis, USA
Fellow in Multiple Sclerosis and Autoimmune Neurology |
2024 - Present
Case Western Reserve University, USA
Master’s Degree Student in Clinical Research Scholar Program | 2024 - Present
Faculty of Medicine, Chiang Mai University, Thailand
Diploma in Clinical Statistics | 2023
Faculty of Medicine, Chiang Mai University, Thailand
Diploma in Clinical Epidemiology | 2022
Mahidol University Siriraj Hospital, Thailand
Fellowship in Neuroimmunology | 2022 - 2023
Faculty of Medicine, Chulalongkorn University, Thailand
Thai Board of Neurology | 2019 - 2022
Faculty of Medicine, Chulalongkorn University, Thailand
